disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Chronic burning upper-abdominal pain for ~6 months, typically between meals or in the early hours, previously eased by food or antacids
trigger_question_examples: Can you tell me about the pain?
How long has this been going on?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've had a burning, gnawing pain high in my stomach for months. It usually came between meals or woke me in the early morning, and eating or antacids used to take the edge off.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Passed two loose, black, tarry, foul-smelling stools today
trigger_question_examples: Have you noticed any change in your bowel motions?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Yes — today I've been twice and it was pitch black, tarry and it smelled awful. I've never seen it like that before.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Marked weakness with lightheadedness and dizziness on standing; looks pale and sweaty
trigger_question_examples: How are you feeling in yourself right now?
Do you feel faint or dizzy when you stand?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I feel incredibly weak, and every time I stand up the room spins and I feel like I'll pass out. My wife says I look really pale and sweaty.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Daily long-term use of an over-the-counter anti-inflammatory (naproxen) for back pain, with no acid-suppressing cover
trigger_question_examples: Do you take any regular painkillers or tablets?
Do you use any anti-inflammatory medication?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I take Naproxen most days for my back — I buy it from the chemist. I'm not on anything for my stomach.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Today's pain is severe, constant and unrelieved, unlike the previous intermittent burning
trigger_question_examples: Is today's pain different from usual?
Is the pain constant or does it come and go?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: Usually it comes and goes, but today it's been agonizing and constant and nothing settles it.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Associated nausea, occasional vomiting, bloating, belching and bad breath
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: I've felt sick and vomited a couple of times, I'm really bloated and burpy, and my breath has been bad.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: Has not vomited any blood or coffee-ground material (pertinent negative)
trigger_question_examples: Have you vomited any blood or anything that looks like coffee grounds?
Has anything you've brought up looked dark or bloody?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't brought up any blood or coffee-ground stuff — it's just been the black stools.

disclosure_items.clinical_fact: No unintentional weight loss and no difficulty swallowing (pertinent negative)
trigger_question_examples: Have you lost weight without trying?
disclosure_items.patient_response_template: No, I haven't lost weight that I've noticed, and swallowing is fine.
